task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the VeraCrypt GUI showing '/home/ga/Volumes/legal_vault.hc' mounted in one of the drive slots, or a successful terminal command mounting the volume.

task_completion.description: Identify files containing the classified phrase.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for evidence of the agent searching for 'CLASSIFIED INFORMATION NONDISCLOSURE AGREEMENT', such as a file search GUI, a terminal 'grep' command, or the agent opening the sensitive files to inspect their contents.

task_completion.description: Move the sensitive files to the mounted volume.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file manager window showing 'draft_nda.txt', 'SF312_Copy.txt', and 'agreement_scan.txt' inside the mounted VeraCrypt volume's directory, or terminal 'mv' commands moving these specific files to the mount point.

task_completion.description: Ensure the sensitive files are removed from their original insecure locations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for file manager views of the Desktop, Documents, and Downloads folders showing that the sensitive files are no longer there, or terminal 'mv'/'rm' commands indicating they were removed from their original paths.

task_completion.description: Do not move or delete distractor files.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the absence of 'shopping_list.txt' and 'meeting_notes.txt' in the mounted volume. Ensure no terminal commands or GUI actions were used to move or delete these distractor files.

task_completion.description: Dismount the encrypted volume when finished.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the VeraCrypt GUI showing all drive slots as empty/unmounted at the end of the task, or a terminal command like 'veracrypt -d' being executed.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent actually moved the files using a file manager or valid terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for genuine file movement actions (drag-and-drop, cut/paste, or 'mv' commands) rather than the agent just echoing success messages or creating empty files with the same names.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent interacted with the actual VeraCrypt volume.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for interaction with the VeraCrypt application or CLI to mount '/home/ga/Volumes/legal_vault.hc'. The agent should not just create a regular directory named 'legal_vault' to bypass decryption.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not tamper with the distractor files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there are no commands or GUI actions that rename, modify, or delete 'shopping_list.txt' or 'meeting_notes.txt'.
